markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, reporting, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** A new Airtable interface streamlines approvals, enabling Brooke to clear the review backlog and restart new content production.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Major SEO Improvement:** A fixed sitemap (broken since 2024) will make all content indexable by Google, resolving a key performance bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift Proposed:** Brooke proposed replacing some blog posts with longer-form, gated content (e.g., e-books) to drive lead generation and reduce her review workload.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [**Reporting Anomaly:** A sharp drop in Scrunch's "overall presence ranking" is likely a reporting tool issue, not a performance problem, and is being investigated.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

## Topics

### SEO & Reporting

  - [**Sitemap Fix:** The site's sitemap, broken since 2024, is now fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Impact:** All content will become indexable by Google, resolving a major SEO bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Expectation:** A significant spike in rankings and organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - **Scrunch Anomaly:** A sharp drop in the "overall presence ranking" (from \#2 to \#0) is likely a Scrunch reporting issue.
      - [**Rationale:** The drop is consistent across multiple GrowthX clients and is attributed to a recent change in Scrunch's citation tracking methodology.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX is investigating with Scrunch to understand the change and determine if prompt adjustments are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Google Analytics Cleanup:** You.com is consolidating GA properties to improve data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Action:** Brooke will notify GrowthX if new invites are required.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Significance:** This cleanup is critical for future conversion tracking, which is the next logical step for the content program.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)

### Content Pipeline & Strategy

  - [**Airtable Interface:** A new drag-and-drop interface in Airtable streamlines the content approval pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Access:** Via the "Interfaces" tab in the Airtable base.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
          - [**Publishing Approval:** Visualizes content status (e.g., SME Review, Needs Revisions).](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
          - [**Article Topics:** Enables Brooke to approve/reject new topics with feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Automation:** Slack notifications will alert GrowthX when content is ready for revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Review Backlog:** Brooke will use the new interface to clear the review backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Goal:** Approve 3 articles by EOW to unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [**Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
          - ["What is AI?" & "MCP" articles are awaiting SME review.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
          - ["Composable API" article is being rewritten as "Composable Architecture."](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [**New Content Production:** With the pipeline unblocked, GrowthX will begin writing 5 articles already in production and will await approval for new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot Proposal:** Brooke proposed replacing some blog posts with longer-form, gated content (e.g., 4k–5k word e-books).](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To drive lead generation and reduce Brooke's review workload.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
      - [**Feasibility:** GrowthX can own high-level topics ("X use cases for retail") with minimal oversight. Highly technical content would still require significant SME involvement.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
      - [**Decision:** To be discussed in the upcoming goal-setting session.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brooke:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [Clear the content review backlog using the new Airtable interface.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
      - [Approve new article topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
      - [Confirm Marcus's availability for next week's goal-setting session.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Send the goal-setting session agenda to Brooke.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Provide Brooke with logins and a demo of the new tool next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
      - [Monitor the site's indexing status post-sitemap fix.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [Investigate the Scrunch reporting anomaly and report findings.](https://fathom.video/share/xtRszZe1JahksCCow9T26fK1buGE97Vx?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
